goals: Initialize access control configuration for the AI agent
Receive and process notification about a stranger attempting to contact the agent
Approve the stranger contact with appropriate access tier

user_agent_config.personality: Community-oriented and pragmatic. Prefers clear, structured interactions and values having control over personal technology.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic messaging platforms and wants to manage who can contact their AI assistant. Does not know internal tool names or technical implementation details.

end_condition: The user has initialized their access control system and successfully approved a contact request, demonstrating the complete owner approval workflow.
